title: Japanese probe Hayabusa2 successfully overflies asteroid Torifune
summary: The spacecraft passed at high speed next to the celestial body and completed observations that will provide key data for space exploration.

title: Sanjuu Mitsuzaki re-elected governor of Shiga for fourth time
summary: The current governor defeated three independent candidates in an election with a turnout close to 40%.

title: United States celebrates 250 years of independence with Trump speech and criticism of privatization
summary: President Trump proclaimed the start of a 'golden era' while sectors denounce the commercialization of patriotic acts.

title: OPEC+ and seven producing countries agree to increase oil quota in August
summary: The measure seeks to stabilize the market amid uncertainty over supply and the resumption of exports from the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Alert for extreme rain and precipitation bands in northern Kyushu
summary: The stationary seasonal front causes risk of floods and landslides in the region.

title: Teenager dies after falling from motorcycle and being run over; minor driver arrested
summary: The 15-year-old girl lost her life after being hit by a vehicle traveling behind; the motorcyclist, also a minor, was arrested for hit-and-run.

title: Rookie Kureha Kurabayashi wins Shiseido JAL Ladies Open in record playoff
summary: The 21-year-old golfer won a seven-player playoff, becoming the first champion from Miyagi in the tournament.

title: Japan commemorates fourth anniversary of Shinzo Abe's assassination with exhibitions and offerings
summary: An exhibition of personal items and a ceremony in Yamaguchi attracted hundreds of people, including his widow and senior officials.

title: NPB day: homers by Kondoh, first home run by Sasahara, and seventh win for Espinoza
summary: In a day full of excitement, Kensuke Kondoh hit two three-run homers, rookie Sasahara blasted his first home run, and Espinoza earned his seventh victory.

title: Japan dominates X Games Chiba with golds in skateboarding
summary: Young Japanese skaters won medals in several categories, highlighting Yumeka Onodera and Funa Nakayama, in a display of generational talent.

title: Akihiro Hayashi wins Chofu mayoral election in first attempt
summary: The former metropolitan assembly member won the election with a turnout of 43.67%.

title: Prime Minister Takaichi congratulates Keiko Fujimori on her victory in Peru
summary: Takaichi sent his congratulations to the right-wing candidate after she declared victory in the presidential election.

title: Takaichi cabinet maintains 65.9% approval rating according to JNN poll
summary: The poll reveals stable support for the government, though analysts warn of possible challenges ahead.

title: Mount Rausu trail reopens after fatal bear attack
summary: Authorities lifted the restriction after securing the area, allowing access to hikers.

title: Iran holds second day of state funeral for Ayatollah Khamenei
summary: The Iranian president and parliament attended the funeral rites amid a massive turnout.

title: Suspected leader of 'Prince G' criminal organization arrested in Japan
summary: The man, wanted by the United States, was arrested for immigration violations while trying to permanently settle in the country.

title: LDP urges early decision on consumption tax reduction for food
summary: The head of the tax commission warned that delaying the measure would affect the fiscal calendar, while the opposition expresses reservations.

title: Japan pushes development of artificial intelligence and quantum computing with multiple initiatives
summary: From acquiring AI startups for education to research on mind-reading AI, the country accelerates technological innovation.

title: Unrecognized Christian pastor released in China, travels to United States after Trump pressure
summary: The clergyman was freed and was able to fly to the US after former President Trump demanded his release from Chinese authorities.

title: Putin boasts of Russian military superiority in conversation with Trump
summary: In their fourth phone contact this year, the Russian president highlighted the strength of his armed forces to the former US president.
